heroTitle: Giving Children With Cancer a Fighting Chance
heroSubtitle: Together, we can turn fear into hope and battles into victories.
aboutText: Founded on compassion and driven by community, Kids-Can Cancer Foundation exists to ensure no child fights cancer alone. From funding treatments to improving living conditions, we are here to hold their hands every step of the way.
missionText: We believe in a future where every child gets the chance to grow, play, and dream. Your support makes that future possible.
